description_long: This is a vintage Shell gasoline pump, featuring a tall, rectangular body with rounded edges and a prominent circular Shell Gasoline sign on top. The front panel displays a mechanical gallon meter, a price indicator, and a Shell logo in orange and brown, with the word 'GALLONS' clearly labeled above the meter. The pump is primarily yellow with brown accents, and the hose and nozzle are attached to the side, looping neatly onto a metal hook. The surface shows signs of age and wear, with some visible scratches and patina, giving it an authentic retro appearance. The pump is constructed from metal, likely steel, with glass or plastic display windows and rubber hoses. This object would typically be found as a standalone feature at a historic or themed gas station, museum, or urban roadside attraction.
description: A vintage yellow and brown Shell gasoline pump with a circular Shell sign on top, mechanical meter, and attached hose and nozzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Shell logo, mechanical meter, and the main display panel with the word 'GALLONS' and price indicators.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the hose and nozzle, as well as the curved top and the Shell sign's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less visible detail on the meter and logo, and the hose positioned to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain yellow surface with minor wear, and the Shell sign's profile at the top.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One visible vintage fuel pump with a tall rectangular body, rounded top, and a single black hose and nozzle attached to the side. The pump is yellow with brown and orange Shell branding, and features a mechanical meter display.
attribute_station_signage: A circular Shell Gasoline sign is mounted on top of the pump, featuring the Shell logo in orange and red on a white background. The front panel also displays the Shell logo and the word 'GALLONS' in red letters.
